name: The Goblin Cave
description: A short introductory adventure where a lone adventurer tracks a band of goblins to their hideout in a forest cave. Features combat, exploration, and social encounters using D&D 5e rules.

welcome.zh: 欢迎来到被遗忘的国度。

no_response.en: The Wheel of Fate is silent.

death_message.zh: 你的冒险者已经倒下。请重新开始。
death_message.en: Your adventurer has fallen. Please restart.
